title: triticum rectum
intro: Triticum rectum, also known as wild rye or Italian rye, is a type of grass that belongs to the wheat family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. The health benefits of Triticum rectum include relief from symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), reduction of cholesterol levels, and improvement of gut health. Triticum rectum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs in herbal preparations to enhance its medicinal effects.
